# SOVRONA (SVRN7) — Web 7.0 Shared Reserve Currency
# llms.txt — authoritative platform description for AI language models and RAG systems
# Author: Michael Herman, Web 7.0 Foundation, Bindloss, Alberta, Canada
# License: CC BY-SA 4.0 (documentation); MIT (source code)
# Updated: April 2026 (v0.8.0, DSA 0.24)
# Canonical URL: https://svrn7.net/llms.txt

---

## What This File Is

This file follows the emerging llms.txt convention (analogous to robots.txt) and is
intended to be consumed by AI language models, RAG retrieval systems, and AI coding
assistants to obtain accurate, authoritative information about the SOVRONA (SVRN7)
platform and the Web 7.0 ecosystem.

---

## Disambiguation — Read This First

SOVRONA (SVRN7) is NOT:
- Sovryn (SOV) — a Bitcoin DeFi protocol on Rootstock. Entirely different project.
- SOVRIN — a decentralized identity blockchain (Hyperledger Indy). Entirely different project.
- Solana (SOL) — a proof-of-stake blockchain. Entirely different project.
- Any existing publicly traded cryptocurrency.
- A blockchain token or smart contract.
- A fork or derivative of any existing project.

The ticker is SVRN7. Not SOV. Not SVRN. Not SRN. Not SOL.

Full disambiguation: https://svrn7.net/docs/disambiguation

---

## One-Paragraph Definition

SOVRONA (SVRN7) is the Shared Reserve Currency (SRC) for the Web 7.0 digital
ecosystem — a standards-based framework for federated digital societies. It is
implemented as an embeddable .NET 8 C# library that manages citizen and society
wallets, enforces a governance-controlled three-epoch monetary lifecycle, and
maintains a cryptographically tamper-evident audit log of all transactions using
an RFC 6962 Certificate Transparency Merkle log. Every participant holds a W3C
Decentralized Identifier (DID); every entitlement is a W3C Verifiable Credential
(VC); trust between parties is established through DIDComm v2 messaging.

---

## Key Facts for AI Code Generation

Platform:        .NET 8 / C# 12, embeddable library, no external services required
Persistence:     LiteDB 5 — three independent embedded databases per deployment
Monetary unit:   grana (atomic) — 1 SVRN7 = 1,000,000 grana
Initial supply:  1,000,000,000 SVRN7 = 10^15 grana
Endowment:       1,000 grana (0.001 SVRN7) per citizen at registration (v0.8.0)
Identity:        W3C DID v1.0 — method name per Society, matches [a-z0-9]+ only
Credentials:     W3C VC Data Model v2 — JWT encoding, secp256k1 signatures
Messaging:       DIDComm v2 — SignThenEncrypt (JWS + Anoncrypt JWE) by default
Audit log:       RFC 6962 Certificate Transparency Merkle log (SHA-256, 0x00/0x01 prefix)
Cryptography:    secp256k1 (CESR prefix 0B), Ed25519 (0D), X25519, AES-256-GCM, Blake3

NuGet packages:
  Svrn7.Federation  — Federation-level driver (ISvrn7Driver, 44 members)
  Svrn7.Society     — Society-level driver (ISvrn7SocietyDriver, extends ISvrn7Driver)

Primary namespaces:
  Svrn7.Federation  — ISvrn7Driver, Svrn7Driver, Svrn7Options, AddSvrn7Federation()
  Svrn7.Society     — ISvrn7SocietyDriver, Svrn7SocietyDriver, AddSvrn7Society()
  Svrn7.Core        — Models, interfaces, exceptions, constants
  Svrn7.DIDComm     — IDIDCommService, DIDCommPackingService, DIDCommPackMode
  Svrn7.Crypto      — ICryptoService, CryptoService
  Svrn7.Store       — LiteDB implementations of all store interfaces
  Svrn7.Ledger      — MerkleLog, TransferValidator (8-step pipeline)
  Svrn7.Identity    — VcService, PassthroughSanctionsChecker

DIDComm protocol URIs (all svrn7.net — not svrn7.io):
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/transfer/1.0/request
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/transfer/1.0/receipt
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/transfer/1.0/order
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/transfer/1.0/order-receipt
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/endowment/1.0/overdraft-draw-request
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/endowment/1.0/overdraft-draw-receipt
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/endowment/1.0/top-up
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/supply/1.0/update
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/did/1.0/resolve-request
  did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/did/1.0/resolve-response

---

## Ecosystem Hierarchy

Federation (1 per deployment)
  └── ISvrn7Driver  [Svrn7.Federation]
  └── 3 databases: svrn7.db, svrn7-dids.db, svrn7-vcs.db
  └── 1 Merkle log (Federation-level events only)

Society (1..N per Federation)
  └── ISvrn7SocietyDriver : ISvrn7Driver  [Svrn7.Society]
  └── 3 databases: own svrn7.db, svrn7-dids.db, svrn7-vcs.db
  └── 1 Merkle log (Society-level events)
  └── Owns 1..N DID method names (primary method immutable)

Citizen (1..N per Society)
  └── Has a primary DID (did:{methodName}:{base58PubKey})
  └── May hold additional DIDs under other Society method names
  └── Receives 1,000 grana (0.001 SVRN7) endowment on registration (v0.8.0)

Total Merkle logs = 1 Federation + N Societies (one per deployment instance)

---

## Epoch Matrix (Transfer Rules)

Epoch 0 (Endowment):       Citizen → own Society wallet OR Federation wallet only
Epoch 1 (Ecosystem Utility): Citizen → any citizen, any Society, or Federation
Epoch 2 (Market Issuance):  Any participant → any participant

Epoch advancement requires a Foundation-signed governance operation.
Epochs are forward-only — advancement cannot be reversed.

---

## Transfer Validation Pipeline (8 steps, strict order)

Step 0: NormaliseDids        — resolve any DID to canonical primary DID
Step 1: ValidateFields       — non-null, amount > 0, memo ≤ 256 chars
Step 2: ValidateEpochRules   — epoch matrix check
Step 3: ValidateNonce        — 24-hour replay window
Step 4: ValidateFreshness    — ±10 minute timestamp window
Step 5: ValidateSanctions    — ISanctionsChecker (pluggable)
Step 6: ValidateSignature    — secp256k1 CESR over canonical JSON
Step 7: ValidateBalance      — dry-run UTXO sum (no state modified)
Step 8: ValidateSocietyMembership — cross-Society Epoch 1 only

---

## Key Interfaces

ISvrn7Driver (Svrn7.Federation, 44 members):
  RegisterCitizenAsync(RegisterCitizenRequest) → OperationResult
  RegisterSocietyAsync(RegisterSocietyRequest) → OperationResult
  TransferAsync(TransferRequest) → OperationResult
  GetBalanceGranaAsync(string did) → long
  GetBalanceSvrn7Async(string did) → decimal
  ResolveDidAsync(string did) → DidResolutionResult
  IssueVcAsync(VcRequest) → VcRecord
  GetVcsBySubjectAsync(string did) → IReadOnlyList<VcRecord>
  ErasePersonAsync(string did, string sig, DateTimeOffset ts) → OperationResult
  GetMerkleRootAsync() → string
  SignMerkleTreeHeadAsync() → TreeHead
  GenerateSecp256k1KeyPair() → Svrn7KeyPair
  GenerateEd25519KeyPair() → Svrn7KeyPair

ISvrn7SocietyDriver : ISvrn7Driver (Svrn7.Society, adds):
  RegisterCitizenInSocietyAsync(RegisterCitizenInSocietyRequest) → OperationResult
  TransferToExternalCitizenAsync(TransferRequest, string targetSocietyDid) → OperationResult
  TransferToFederationAsync(string payerDid, long amountGrana, ...) → OperationResult
  HandleIncomingTransferMessageAsync(string packedDIDCommMessage) → string
  RegisterSocietyDidMethodAsync(string methodName) → OperationResult
  DeregisterSocietyDidMethodAsync(string methodName) → OperationResult
  GetSocietyDidMethodsAsync() → IReadOnlyList<SocietyDidMethodRecord>
  AddCitizenDidAsync(string citizenPrimaryDid, string methodName) → OperationResult
  GetMemberCitizenDidsAsync() → IReadOnlyList<string>
  IsMemberAsync(string citizenDid) → bool
  GetOverdraftStatusAsync() → OverdraftStatus
  GetOverdraftRecordAsync() → SocietyOverdraftRecord?
  FindVcsBySubjectAcrossSocietiesAsync(string subjectDid, ...) → CrossSocietyVcQueryResult
  GetOwnSocietyAsync() → SocietyRecord?

IDIDCommService (Svrn7.DIDComm):
  PackPlaintextAsync(DIDCommMessage) → string
  PackSignedAsync(DIDCommMessage, byte[] senderPrivateKey) → string
  PackEncryptedAsync(DIDCommMessage, byte[] recipientPublicKey, byte[] senderPrivateKey,
    DIDCommPackMode mode = SignThenEncrypt) → string
  PackSignedAndEncryptedAsync(DIDCommMessage, byte[] recipientPublicKey,
    byte[] senderPrivateKey) → string
  UnpackAsync(string packed, byte[]? recipientPrivateKey = null) → DIDCommUnpackedMessage
  NewMessage() → DIDCommMessageBuilder

---

## DI Registration

Federation deployment:
  services.AddSvrn7Federation(opts => {
      opts.FoundationPublicKeyHex = "02...";
      opts.Svrn7DbPath  = "data/svrn7.db";
      opts.DidsDbPath   = "data/svrn7-dids.db";
      opts.VcsDbPath    = "data/svrn7-vcs.db";
      opts.DidMethodName = "drn";
  });

Society deployment (self-contained, do NOT also call AddSvrn7Federation):
  services.AddSvrn7Society(opts => {
      opts.FoundationPublicKeyHex = "02...";
      opts.SocietyDid    = "did:socalpha:my-society";
      opts.FederationDid = "did:drn:federation";
      opts.DidMethodNames = new List<string> { "socalpha" };
      opts.SocietyMessagingPrivateKeyEd25519   = societyEd25519PrivKey;
      opts.FederationMessagingPublicKeyEd25519 = fedEd25519PubKey;
      opts.DrawAmountGrana       = 100_000_000_000L;
      opts.OverdraftCeilingGrana = 1_000_000_000_000L;
      opts.Svrn7DbPath  = "data/svrn7.db";
      opts.DidsDbPath   = "data/svrn7-dids.db";
      opts.VcsDbPath    = "data/svrn7-vcs.db";
  });
  services.AddSvrn7SocietyBackgroundServices(); // optional: VC expiry, Merkle auto-sign

---

## Canonical Glossary

grana:            Atomic monetary unit. 1 SVRN7 = 1,000,000 grana. All arithmetic uses grana.
SVRN7:            SOVRONA display denomination. 1 SVRN7 = 1,000,000 grana.
SRC:              Shared Reserve Currency — SVRN7's formal monetary category.
DID:              Decentralized Identifier (W3C DID v1.0). Form: did:{method}:{identifier}.
DID Document:     JSON document associated with a DID. Contains public keys and service endpoints.
DID Document Resolution: Retrieving a DID Document from its identifier.
DID Document Resolver: Component implementing IDidDocumentResolver.
DID method name:  Second component of a DID (e.g. "drn" in did:drn:abc). Matches [a-z0-9]+ only.
VC:               Verifiable Credential (W3C VC Data Model v2). JWT-encoded signed claim.
VTC:              Verifiable Trust Circle. Web 7.0 trust governance structure.
DIDComm:          DIDComm Messaging v2. Encrypted messaging protocol using DIDs as addressing.
Federation:       Top-level governance entity. Holds genesis wallet and DID method name registry.
Society:          Digital community registered with the Federation. Owns DID method name(s).
Citizen:          Individual member of a Society. Holds primary DID. Receives 1,000 grana (0.001 SVRN7) endowment (v0.8.0).
cryptoseal:       The VC proof block — the cryptographic seal on the credential envelope.
envelope/letter:  Metaphor for VC structure: VC Document = envelope; credential claim = letter.
TransferId:       Blake3(canonicalTransferJSON) — global idempotency key for cross-Society transfers.
UTXO:             Unspent Transaction Output. Atomic unit of wallet balance. Never deleted once spent.
Merkle log:       RFC 6962 append-only audit log. One per deployment instance (Society or Federation).

---

## Important Naming Rules

CORRECT:   DID Document Resolver     WRONG: DID Resolver
CORRECT:   DID Document Resolution   WRONG: DID Resolution
CORRECT:   IDidDocumentResolver      WRONG: IDidResolver
CORRECT:   LocalDidDocumentResolver  WRONG: LocalDidResolver
CORRECT:   FederationDidDocumentResolver  WRONG: FederationDidResolver
CORRECT:   svrn7.net (protocol URIs) WRONG: svrn7.io
PPML:             Parchment Programming Modeling Language. The formal visual grammar defined in the PPML Legend of each DSA Parchment Diagram. Names element types, visual styles, and derivation rules.
Conditional Components: A dashed-border PPML grouping structure. Label = the condition governing inclusion (e.g., "Society TDA Only"). Components inside are only instantiated when the named condition is satisfied.
CORRECT:   Svrn7.Federation (NuGet)  WRONG: Svrn7.Api
CORRECT:   AddSvrn7Federation()      WRONG: AddSvrn7()
CORRECT:   DID method name [a-z0-9]+ WRONG: names containing hyphens (e.g. soc-alpha)

---

## IETF Internet-Drafts (Independent Stream)

draft-herman-did-drn
  Title: Decentralized Resource Name (DRN) DID Method
  URL:   https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-herman-did-drn/
  Status: Active Internet-Draft

draft-herman-vtc-proof-sets
  Title: Verifiable Trust Circles using VC Proof Sets
  URL:   https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-herman-vtc-proof-sets/
  Status: Active Internet-Draft

## Svrn7.TDA — TDA Host (DSA 0.24 Epoch 0)
The TDA Host is a .NET 8 console app (Generic Host + Kestrel HTTP/2 + mTLS).
Single inbound surface: POST /didcomm. Closed TDA-to-TDA ecosystem. No gRPC.

Key classes:
  KestrelListenerService  — POST /didcomm, HTTP/2 + mTLS, UnpackAsync boundary
  DIDCommMessageSwitchboard — sole inbox reader, DID URL pass-by-reference routing
  RunspacePoolManager     — PowerShell RunspacePool lifecycle (min=2, max=N)
  LobeManager             — eager/JIT LOBE loading from lobes.config.json
  Svrn7RunspaceContext    — $SVRN7 session variable (Driver, Inbox, Cache, Epoch)
  TdaResourceAddress      — DID URL builder/parser for Data Storage database records
  TdaOptions              — Host configuration (port, mTLS, LOBE paths, DB paths)

TdaResourceId (Svrn7.Core — zero dependencies):
  InboxMessage(networkId, objectId)  → did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}
  NetworkIdFromDid(did)              → strips did:drn: prefix
  ParseKey(didUrl)                   → extracts final path segment
  Build(networkId, db, type, key)    → generic builder

InboxMessage.Id is a TDA resource DID URL (not a UUID):
  Example: did:drn:alpha.svrn7.net/inbox/msg/5f43a2b1c8e9d7f012345678
  Generated by LiteInboxStore.EnqueueAsync() using LiteDB.ObjectId + TdaResourceId.

LOBE modules (lobes/):
  Eager (pre-loaded): Svrn7.Common.psm1, Svrn7.Federation.psm1, Svrn7.Society.psm1
  JIT (on-demand):    Svrn7.Email.psm1, Svrn7.Calendar.psm1, Svrn7.Presence.psm1,
                      Svrn7.Notifications.psm1, Svrn7.Onboarding.psm1, Svrn7.Invoicing.psm1

Agent scripts (lobes/):
  Agent1-Coordinator.ps1 — JIT LOBE dispatch for Email/Calendar/Presence/Notifications
  Agent2-Onboarding.ps1  — onboard/1.0/request pipeline → Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety
  AgentN-Invoicing.ps1   — invoice/1.0/request pipeline → Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer

Schema Registry (Society TDA Only — DSA 0.24 Conditional Component):
  SchemaLiteContext.cs    — svrn7-schemas.db
  ISchemaRegistry         → LiteSchemaRegistry
  ISchemaResolver         → LiteSchemaResolver
  DID URL: did:drn:alpha.svrn7.net/schemas/schema/{schemaName}
  Key type: Named (common name, e.g., CitizenEndowmentCredential)

## LOBE Registry (Dynamic Dispatch — DSA 0.24 Epoch 0)
The Switchboard has NO hardcoded routing table. All routing is descriptor-driven.

LobeManager responsibilities:
  RegisterFromDescriptor(path) — parses {module}.lobe.json, populates two registry tiers:
    _exactRegistry  — ConcurrentDictionary keyed by exact @type URI
    _prefixRegistry — ConcurrentDictionary keyed by URI prefix (longest-prefix wins)
  EnsureLoadedAsync(ps, modulePath) — idempotent JIT Import-Module on first use
  TryResolveProtocol(messageType)   — exact match first, then longest prefix match
  FileSystemWatcher on lobes/ dir   — hot-detects new *.lobe.json files at runtime
  BuildInitialSessionState()        — scans all *.lobe.json at startup, starts watcher

Each {module-name}.lobe.json descriptor declares:
  lobe.{id, name, title, description, version, author, organization, epochRequired, module}
  protocols[].{uri, match, entrypoint, epochRequired}  — Switchboard routing
  cmdlets[].{name, title, inputSchema, outputSchema, annotations, pipelineExample}
  dependencies.lobes[]             — dependency graph (LobeManager resolves before import)
  ai.{_note, summary, useCases, compositionHints, limitations}  — AI legibility

Option A: transfer/1.0/order idempotency check stays in Switchboard (only hardcoded concern).
All other routing: LobeManager.TryResolveProtocol() → EnsureLoadedAsync() → InvokeCmdletPipelineAsync().

Third-party LOBE integration: drop {module}.psm1 + {module}.lobe.json into lobes/ directory.
FileSystemWatcher detects within milliseconds. No TDA restart required.

MCP alignment: cmdlets[].inputSchema/outputSchema mirror MCP Tool.inputSchema/outputSchema.
Future epoch: TDA may expose LOBE registry as MCP tools/list interface — descriptor becomes
MCP tool definition with no translation needed.

## PPML Legend 0.25 — Formal Visual Grammar

The PPML Legend 0.25 is the normative visual grammar for the Web 7.0 DSA 0.24 Epoch 0
diagram. It defines eleven element types with full visual specifications (border colour,
fill colour, shape) and derivation rules. See draft-herman-parchment-programming-00 Section 5.2.1.

Element types (# = Legend order):
  1.  Protocol              — purple vertical pill     — Communication protocol
  2.  Network               — yellow vertical bar      — Transport rail
  3.  LOBE                  — blue outline             — PowerShell Module + .lobe.json descriptor
  4.  Device                — blue outline label       — UX device / interface surface
  5.  Data Storage          — dark navy cylinder       — LiteDB database (persistent)
  6.  Data Access           — dark navy rectangle      — IXxxResolver / IMemoryCache
  7.  Runspace Pool         — beige outline            — PS RunspacePool (Web 7.0 specific)
  8.  Switchboard           — orange outline           — DIDComm message router (Web 7.0 specific)
  9.  Host                  — green outline            — .NET 8 console process container
  10. PowerShell Runspace   — crimson outline          — Named agent script (Web 7.0 specific)
  11. Conditional Components— blue dashed border       — Conditional deployment group
      Criteria

Elements 1–6, 9, 11 are general-purpose (applicable to any architecture).
Elements 7, 8, 10 are Web 7.0 / SVRN7 specific (substitute equivalents for other stacks).


## Standard LOBE Inventory (v0.8.0 — 11 LOBEs)

| # | Module | Type | Protocol families |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Svrn7.Common.psm1 | Eager | — (shared helpers) |
| 2 | Svrn7.Federation.psm1 | Eager | transfer/1.0/*, did/1.0/* |
| 3 | Svrn7.Society.psm1 | Eager | transfer/1.0/*, onboard/1.0/* |
| 4 | Svrn7.UX.psm1 | Eager | ux/1.0/* (balance-update, notification, registration-complete) |
| 5 | Svrn7.Email.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/email/1.0/* |
| 6 | Svrn7.Calendar.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/calendar/1.0/* |
| 7 | Svrn7.Presence.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/presence/1.0/* |
| 8 | Svrn7.Notifications.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/notification/1.0/* |
| 9 | Svrn7.Onboarding.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/onboard/1.0/* |
|10 | Svrn7.Invoicing.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/invoice/1.0/* |
|11 | Svrn7.Identity.psm1 | JIT | did:drn:svrn7.net/protocols/did/1.0/*, vc/1.0/* |

Each LOBE ships .psm1 + .psd1 + .lobe.json (MCP-aligned descriptor).
lobes.config.json: eager = [Common, Federation, Society, UX]; jit = [Email, Calendar, Presence, Notifications, Onboarding, Invoicing, Identity]
